summary: Iteration 9 - Testing new changes: 1) Backend AI language support for all 12 languages via LANG_NAMES dict and get_lang_name helper, 2) Frontend checklist category UI with activeCategory state, 3) work.tsx i18n completion (no remaining language.code === 'ro' patterns), 4) kitchen.tsx sends language parameter in generateMealPlan. context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 verified all the new changes: 1) Backend LANG_NAMES dict and get_lang_name helper function are correctly implemented at lines 33-41 in server.py, 2) All 10 AI endpoints use get_lang_name() instead of hardcoded is_ro, 3) organize.tsx has activeCategory state (line 67) and category-based checklist UI (lines 230-300), 4) work.tsx has no remaining 'language.code === ro' patterns - all replaced with t() function calls, 5) kitchen.tsx sends language.code in generateMealPlan (lines 82-88), 6) All 11 translation JSON files have the required keys. All backend APIs are working correctly.
